title: Teams
subtitle: Run reusable multi-agent crews, then tune their blueprint, bindings, and collaboration adapters only when needed.

steps.discoverDescription: Create a team from a built-in blueprint or a remote seed.
steps.runDescription: Dispatch a mission, decide on role routing, and enable collaboration when needed.
steps.tuneDescription: Adjust roles, skill bindings, and engines only after you see the run quality.

market.description: Search and pull remote team seeds from ClawHub, then bootstrap them into a local team blueprint.
market.emptyPrompt: Search by keyword to load remote team seeds.

create.title: Create Team
create.description: Start from a reusable blueprint, or build a team from a custom baseline.
create.agentPresetDescription: Apply this runtime binding profile to roles created in this step.
create.agentPromptPlaceholder: Optional system prompt override. Leave empty to auto-generate by role.

management.title: Team Library
management.description: Teams already created on this device.
management.empty: No teams yet. Create one to start a reusable workflow.
management.focusTitle: Pick a team, then hand it a mission.
management.focusDescription: Use Workbench for daily execution. Use Studio only when you need to change the blueprint.

template.title: Blueprint Library
template.description: Bootstrap vertical teams with reusable blueprints.

custom.title: Custom Team
custom.description: Create a team from a blank baseline.
custom.name: Team Name
custom.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe goals, scope, and operating boundaries.

detail.missing: Team not found or already removed.
detail.overviewDescription: Review team status, Feishu connectivity, and current throughput.
detail.snapshotDescription: Review context first, then decide whether to run a mission or adjust the blueprint.
detail.nextStepDescription: Daily work starts in Workbench. Deeper build and audit flows live in Studio and Runs.
detail.logSummary: Only the latest records are shown here. Full details live in Runs.
detail.workspaceDescription: Profile, topology, and engine choices live here. Daily execution stays in Workbench.
detail.taskBoardDescription: Run history is separated from the mission form for easier troubleshooting.
detail.logBoardDescription: Audit logs are separated from runs so runtime health is easier to inspect.
detail.runtimeBindingDescription: Teams act as a coordination layer. Bind each role to the engine that fits the job.
detail.workbenchChecklist1: 1. Start the team before dispatching missions.
detail.workbenchChecklist2: 2. Pick the collaboration protocol that fits the mission.
detail.workbenchChecklist3: 3. Review Runs when the output or handoff looks wrong.
detail.roomDescription: Talk to the team like a shared room. The room lead coordinates handoffs, and Studio stays out of the way until you need it.
detail.roomPaused: This room is paused. Start the team before sending a new mission.
detail.participantsDescription: {{online}} online, {{total}} total. Use Studio only if you need to change who does what.
detail.boardDescription: Track only the few room states that matter: in flight, blocked, and done.
detail.artifactsDescription: Delivered outputs and blocked runs surface here first. Full traces stay in Runs.
detail.artifactsEmpty: No delivered artifacts yet. The room will surface results here once people start replying.

roles.title: Roles & Engine Bindings
roles.description: Save to regenerate each role SOUL.md profile and runtime binding.
roles.agentDescription: Provider, model, and prompt settings used to launch and route this role.

dispatch.title: Mission Console
dispatch.description: Give the team a goal and choose how the room should coordinate roles and engines for delivery.
dispatch.taskPlaceholder: Example: plan a 3-step growth experiment and assign research, drafting, and review
dispatch.workbenchHint: Dispatch from Workbench. Use Studio for role design and Runs for history and audit.
dispatch.protocolHint: Choose how the room coordinates roles and engines for this mission.

dialog.dissolveMessage: This will delete local configuration and SOUL assets for {{name}}. This action cannot be undone.
